title: gonystylus lucidulus
intro: Gonystylus lucidulus, also known as the silver leaf or red ironwood, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gonystylus lucidulus include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-diarrheal agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's heartwood and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
